name: Not Danny Glover's Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper or red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Make vegetable stock by boiling at least one carrot, several bay leaves, and any leftover root vegetables for 45 minutes in 6 cups of water.
2. Add the black-eyed peas and simmer for about 30 minutes.
3. Chop the onion, celery, and bell pepper (remove all the celery leaves from the top of the bunch, rinse well, and chop them too).
4. Sauté the onion in a little oil until softened.
5. Add the celery and bell pepper to the pan and sauté for a few minutes.
6. Sprinkle generous amounts of the spices over the mixture and continue to sauté for another minute.
7. Remove the carrot pieces, vegetable scraps, and bay leaves from the stock.
8. Add the onion mixture and chopped tomatoes to the stock, stirring well and adding more water if necessary.
9. Let simmer for about 10 minutes.
10. Chop the okra and stir it into the corn with the remaining ingredients; let simmer for another 10 minutes.
11. Adjust the spices to taste and serve with cornbread.
